birthday_whatsapp.label: Birthday
birthday_whatsapp.body: Hey {customer_name}, your birthday is coming up! 🎂 Celebrate with us at StoneOven — we have something special waiting for you.

birthday_email.label: Birthday
birthday_email.subject: Your birthday is coming up, {name}!
birthday_email.body: We'd love to celebrate your special day with you at StoneOven. Visit any outlet and enjoy a complimentary treat on us.

anniversary_whatsapp.label: Anniversary
anniversary_whatsapp.body: Hey {customer_name}, your anniversary is almost here! 💑 Come celebrate at StoneOven with a romantic dining experience.

anniversary_email.label: Anniversary
anniversary_email.subject: Your anniversary is coming up, {name}!
anniversary_email.body: Celebrate your love at StoneOven. Book a table for two and enjoy a romantic dining experience curated just for you.

reengagement_whatsapp.label: Re-engagement
reengagement_whatsapp.body: Hey {customer_name}, we miss you! 👋 It's been a while since your last visit — come back to StoneOven, your favourite table is waiting.

reengagement_email.label: Re-engagement
reengagement_email.subject: We miss you, {name}!
reengagement_email.body: It's been {days} days since your last visit and we'd love to have you back. Our kitchen is ready and your favourite table is waiting.

welcome_whatsapp.label: Welcome
welcome_whatsapp.body: Welcome to StoneOven, {customer_name}! 🍽️ We're thrilled to have you. Scan your QR on every visit to unlock rewards and surprises.

welcome_email.label: Welcome
welcome_email.subject: Welcome to StoneOven, {name}!
welcome_email.body: We're thrilled to welcome you to the StoneOven family. Every visit earns you loyalty points and exclusive birthday & anniversary surprises.

promotional_whatsapp.label: Promotional Offer
promotional_whatsapp.triggerDesc: Admin triggers manually to active customers
promotional_whatsapp.body: Hey {customer_name}! 🎉 We have a special offer just for you at StoneOven. Visit us this week and enjoy exclusive deals.

promotional_email.label: Promotional Offer
promotional_email.triggerDesc: Admin triggers manually to active customers
promotional_email.subject: Special offer for you at StoneOven!
promotional_email.body: We have an exclusive offer waiting for you at StoneOven. Visit us this week and enjoy special deals curated just for our loyal customers.

announcement_whatsapp.label: Product Announcement
announcement_whatsapp.triggerDesc: Admin triggers manually to all customers
announcement_whatsapp.body: Exciting news, {customer_name}! 🍽️ We've added something new to our menu at StoneOven. Come in and be the first to try it!

announcement_email.label: Product Announcement
announcement_email.triggerDesc: Admin triggers manually to all customers
announcement_email.subject: Something new at StoneOven!
announcement_email.body: We are excited to announce a new addition to our menu. Come visit us at StoneOven and be among the first to experience it.
